title: PvP Essential Utilities
description: A texture pack to give the player an advantage over others, whilst still keeping the vanilla feel.
body:
A streamlined PvP and survival texture pack focused on clarity and performance. Uncluttered visuals, reduced noise, and enhanced visibility of traps, overlays, and particles. Includes transparent GUI, clear liquids, subtle sound edits, and refined environmental effects.

## **Features**

## **Textures**
Custom Crosshair

Old xp bottles

3D Smooth end crystals

Smooth respawn anchor & glowstone

## **Sounds**
No explosion sounds

No fire damage sound

No death sound

No cave ambient sounds

No ender pearl teleportation sound

Totem pop sound is a low volume firework rocket

## **Particles**
No explosion particles

No generic particles

Hollowed gust particles

All particles are transparent

## **Overlays**
Lower opacity beacon beam whilst in a beacon beam

Lower opacity powdered snow freeze overlay

Lower fire

Old enchantment glint

No vignette

No pumpkin blur

## **Opacity**
Lower nether portal opacity

No fishing bobber

Clear water

Clear lava

Clear view whilst in powdered snow

Lower opacity rain

Lower opacity snow

## **Gui**
Transparent gui

Brewing guide

## **Visibility**
No Fog

More obvious powdered snow

More obvious trapped chests

More obvious string

More obvious suspicious sand 

More obvious suspicious gravel

Lower totem

Lower shield

Shorter tall grass

Side shield

Smaller hand held items

Eating animations

Bow and crossbow status

## **Credits**
Texture pack made by Shikaru

GUI - Chronicaly

Improved Brewing Guide - Moonbert0

Visible Suspicious Sand - micro

LeoTweaks 3D String - Darkleonard

PvP ClearStrike - MAK66

Smaller Totem - Reverseeh

No Fog - Hxndrik

Eating Animation Resource Pack - Bluebird

Bow Status - CapTommy

3D Crystals - CapTommy

Respawn Anchors & Glowstone - CapTommy

Smaller Handhelds - dark_phoenix_
